examples: Many children have a menagerie of stuffed animals in their rooms.
As recent converts to vegetarianism and animal rights, they now live with a menagerie of stray animals.
The bizarre and suggestive menagerie of creatures that followed Godzilla onto the silver screen ranged from the intriguing to the ridiculous.
It is a menagerie of home-constructed machines including boats, planes, architectural constructions, and prize-winning robots.
He keeps a menagerie of monkeys and peacocks in the grounds of his office.
